steps.title: Step 1
steps.content: Convert furlongs to yards: $372 \text{ furlongs} \times 220 \text{ yd/furlong} = 81{,}840 \text{ yd}$.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.content: Convert yards to feet: $81{,}840 \text{ yd} \times 3 \text{ ft/yd} = 245{,}520 \text{ ft}$.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.content: Equivalently: $372 \times 220 \times 3 = 372 \times 660 = 245{,}520$. This single product works because each furlong is first converted to yards and each yard is then converted to feet, so the units cancel in sequence. Therefore, Choice D is correct.

choiceAnalysis:
• Choice A — $318$: Far too small; likely from dividing instead of multiplying. ✗
  • Choice B — $426$: Far too small; does not match any unit conversion. ✗
  • Choice C — $27,280$: Result of multiplying $372 \times 220 \div 3$ (dividing by 3 instead of multiplying). ✗
  • Choice D — $245,520$: $372 \times 220 \times 3 = 245{,}520$ ✓. ✓
D is correct.
